summary: Tested Phase 4 features: temporal ranking convergence (Spearman ρ), backfill summaries endpoint, summary stats, convergence settings, and tabbed AI summaries UI. All 14 backend tests pass. Frontend correctly shows tabbed summaries for papers with pre-gen data and falls back to legacy impact_summary for others.

minor.issue: One paper (openai:gpt-5) has summaries stored as dict instead of string - legacy data format inconsistency

passed_tests: GET /api/health returns 200 with status=ok
GET /api/admin/progress?category=cs.RO returns convergence-based Goal 2 (Ranking stability ρ ≥ 0.95)
Goal 2 includes latest_rho, snapshots (5), done/total fields
Goal 2 no longer references CI (correctly replaced with ranking stability)
GET /api/admin/settings returns convergence_threshold=0.95, convergence_rounds=3
GET /api/admin/settings returns summary_source=round_robin, summary_parallel=10
GET /api/admin/settings returns min_matches_per_paper=3, max_matches_per_paper=20
PUT /api/admin/settings accepts convergence_threshold (float 0.5-1.0) and convergence_rounds (int)
POST /api/admin/backfill-summaries endpoint exists and returns status
POST /api/admin/backfill-summaries accepts category filter
GET /api/admin/summary-stats returns pregen_coverage_rate and with_pregen_summaries
GET /api/papers/{id} for paper with summaries returns summaries field with provider:model keys
GET /api/convergence?category=cs.RO returns convergence data
GET /api/leaderboard?category=cs.RO returns papers correctly
Paper detail page shows tabbed AI summaries (Gemini/Claude/GPT tabs) for paper 1b752605-7045-46f2-8308-a2e0142aa8a7
Paper detail page falls back to legacy impact_summary for papers without pre-gen summaries
Admin settings page shows Convergence Threshold (ρ) = 0.95
Admin settings page shows Convergence Rounds = 3
Admin settings page shows Summary Source dropdown = Round Robin (all 3)
CI Target field correctly removed from admin settings
Section Char Limit field correctly removed from admin settings
Leaderboard loads correctly with 8 papers (135 total)
critical_code_review_comments: scheduler.py _store_ranking_snapshot() correctly stores ranking snapshots after each comparison round
_check_goals_met() uses Spearman ρ from scipy.stats.spearmanr for temporal ranking convergence
admin.py progress endpoint correctly calculates Goal 2 using ranking snapshots
SettingsUpdate model correctly includes convergence_threshold (float) and convergence_rounds (int)
PaperPage.jsx getSummaryEntries() correctly parses summaries by provider:model key format
PaperPage.jsx correctly falls back to impact_summary when summaries field is empty/missing
AdminPage.jsx includes all new settings fields with appropriate tooltips
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 (convergence-based architecture + backfill) complete. Settings: convergence_threshold=0.95, convergence_rounds=3, min_matches_per_paper=3, max_matches_per_paper=20. Ranking snapshots collection has 5 entries per category (seeded during startup). Paper 1b752605-7045-46f2-8308-a2e0142aa8a7 has pre-gen summaries from gemini, claude, and openai. About 33% of papers have pre-gen summaries. Goal 2 now uses Spearman ρ for ranking stability instead of CI-based stopping.

temporal_ranking_convergence.implementation: _check_goals_met uses scipy.stats.spearmanr comparing current ranking vs 2 rounds ago

tabbed_summaries_ui.fallback: legacy impact_summary when no pre-gen summaries
